reviews.comment:
Muy lentos A PROPOSITO LACRAS LLENAS DE MAÑAS QUE SE SALVARON DE LA MODERNIZACION DE LOS 90 PORQUE ES EL ACA.hablan con todos demoran desaparecen los empleados todo para que se forme cola con solo dos autos. PRECIOS ALTISIMOS si no queres perder dos horas anda a la del boulevard y bs as o la shell o axion, gente joven rapida y efectiva

(Translated by Google)
Very slow. On purpose, they're a bunch of shady characters who escaped the modernization of the '90s because it's the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). They talk to everyone, they delay service, employees disappear—all so that a line forms with only two cars. Extremely high prices. If you don't want to waste two hours, go to the one on Boulevard and Buenos Aires, or the Shell or Axion; young people, fast and efficient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNMy02YVNREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lentos los playeros! Se forman colas interminables!! Un calvario!! Todos los años lo mismo en esa YPF del automóvil club!! Insufriblesss!!

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants are so slow! The lines are endless!! It's a nightmare!! It's the same every year at that YPF station by the automobile club!! Unbearable!!
